messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchHistory'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [fetchHistory, user]

fix.text: [fetchHistory, user]

source:
"use client"; import { useState } from 'react'; import Link from 'next/link'; import Navbar from '@/components/layout/Navbar'; import Footer from '@/components/layout/Footer'; import { Users, Calendar, MapPin, MessageCircle, ExternalLink, QrCode, Construction } from 'lucide-react'; export default function CommunityBoardClient({ events, groups }) { const [cityFilter, setCityFilter] = useState('All'); const cities = ['All', ...Array.from(new Set([ ...events.map(e => e.city), ...groups.filter(g => g.city).map(g => g.city) ])).sort()]; const filteredEvents = events.filter(e => cityFilter === 'All' || e.city === cityFilter ); const filteredGroups = groups.filter(g => cityFilter === 'All' || !g.city || g.city === cityFilter ); return (
{/* Under Construction Banner */}

馃毀 Under Construction 鈥?Events and groups shown are sample data. Real community listings coming soon!

{/* Header */}

Community Hub

Break out of the bubble. Join verified groups and attend events across China.

{/* Main Content - Events */}

Upcoming Events

{filteredEvents.length === 0 ? (

No events currently scheduled{cityFilter !== 'All' ? ` in ${cityFilter}` : ''}.

) : ( filteredEvents.map(event => (

{event.title}

{event.type}
{event.date_display}
{event.location}
{event.attendees} Attending
)) )}
{/* Missing City */}

Don't see events in your city?

{/* Sidebar - Groups */}

Curated Groups

You must be logged in to access group QR codes to prevent spam.
{filteredGroups.map((group) => (

{group.name}

{group.platform} 鈥?/span> {group.members}
{group.status === 'Active' ? ( ) : ( FULL )}
))}
); }

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'setStep'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'setStep' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [user, matchResults, step, setStep]

fix.text: [user, matchResults, step, setStep]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'formData' and 'supabase'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [user, matchResults, supabase, formData]

fix.text: [user, matchResults, supabase, formData]
